description: Cross-session data leakage: creates a resource with a canary value in session A, then attempts to read that resource from session B. Canary presence in session B response indicates session isolation failure.

probes.description: Write canary value in session A
Read from session B — canary must not appear

assertions.description: Canary from session A must not appear in session B (cross-session leakage)

remediation: Each MCP session must have an isolated namespace for all persistent state. Server-side storage keys must be scoped to the session ID, never shared across sessions. Implement session ID validation on every read/write operation.
